headline: Bitcoin Gets Its First Bond Rating as Moody's Grades New Hampshire Deal
summary: Moody's has rated a New Hampshire Bitcoin-backed bond—a first for BTC as direct bond collateral.

raw.headline: Bitcoin Gets Its First Bond Rating as Moody's Grades New Hampshire Deal
raw.summary: Moody's has rated a New Hampshire Bitcoin-backed bond—a first for BTC as direct bond collateral.

headline: Bitcoin-Backed Muni Bond Clears Hurdle With Moody’s Rating
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The riskiest asset class is converging with one of the safest in a first-of-its-kind financial product: A Bitcoin-backed municipal bond. The New Hampshire Business Finance Authority’s plans for such a security — which they say is unprecedented — earned a Ba2 rating from Moody’s Investors Service on Tuesday. That’s the second-highest level of speculative grade.Bitcoin mining and data center company CleanSpark will borrow the proceeds and deposit the Bitcoin collateral into a trust,

headline: CoreWeave's $8.5 Billion Financing & 12% Stock Surge: A Deep Dive
summary: CRWV secured an $8.5B GPU-backed loan with investment-grade ratings, cutting borrowing costs and supporting AI infrastructure expansion despite rising debt risks.

headline: Assessing Moody’s (MCO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings
summary: Moody's stock in focus Moody's (MCO) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price swings, with the stock showing gains over the past week but declines over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Moody's. At a share price of US$436.25, Moody's has seen short term pressure with a 30 day share price return of 8.66% and a 90 day share price return of 14.60%. The 3 year total shareholder return of 47.11% points to a stronger longer term record, which may indicate...
